summary: Fans rave about the emotional weight of this final show, but give no details on the recording's sound quality.
review: All three reviewers describe this performance as a deeply personal farewell – calling it "the best show" and remembering Jerry with tears and love. No comments address the audio source or musical specifics, so the technical quality remains unknown while the sentiment is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent 5‑star reviews express strong emotional approval; lacking any criticism, the rating leans high despite no technical information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues; therefore recording quality cannot be assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No musical details were provided; reviewers focused on personal significance rather than set structure.
